titleStmt.title: SII 29.41: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 41. (A.R. No. B. 570 of 1961-62.) KAPGAL, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab kept on the wall near the Joḍ-Īśvara temple [two pieces].

It records that during the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva a grant of land for the temple of Bhōgēśvaradēva, at Bhattagrama Kappekallu, for the maṭha and for the well, and a oil mill for perpetual lamp were made by the queen Paṁpādēvi, daughter of Chāmaladēvi, while camping at Keṟeyūru. Kappekallu is stated to have been situated in Gorikallu-12, a division of Mosaḷikallu-300.
It is dated Śaka 991. Saumya, uttarāyaṇa, saṁkrānti corresponding to 1069 A.D., December 24 Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājaṁṣri(śrī)rāmaparamēśvara
paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmadbhuvanai
kamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamāna mācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire keṟeyūra nelevīḍinoḷ svastyanavarata
parama kalyāṇābhyudaya sahasra phaḷa bhōgabhāgini dvitīya la
kṣī samāne gōtra nidāne parivāra cintāmaṇi vivēka cūḍāmaṇi kastū
ri(ka)kāmōda gītavinōdi malepaveḍaṁgi cāmaladēviyaraṇuṁgi śrīma
dbhuvanaikamalladēva viśāḷa vakṣasthaḷa nivāsiniyarappa śrīmatpaṁpā
dēviyar sakavarṣa 991 saumya saṁvatsarada Uttarāyaṇa saṁkānti
tithi nimittadiṁ mosaḷikallu 300 ṟa baḷiya kaṁpaṇa gōrikallu panneraḍu
ṟoḷagaṇa bhattagrāma kappakalla bhōgēśvaradēvargge maṟecēḍa baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa
lu paḍuvaluvāgi sarbbabādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭa kariyanela matta 9
maṭhakke mattar 4 . Antu mattar 13 bāvige mattar 5
naṁdādīvigege gāṇa 1 . keṟeya mattar 6 Antu mattar 24 . sā

lepālaniyō bhavadbhi sarbbānē
yō yācate rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ pa
ṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
llabharāja manōja kāmini śōbhitē māpayēva navā
tta māganiguṇundi tēdāna vinōdavanō katā bareyaṁdu banne
. didaluṁdra muvāgaṁ kidramadēṁdildeppadaṁ nilladella
di baḷiyantāṁ salpadārggādipaṁ paḍibhaṁdaṁ kuḍivāṁka
śāsanaṁ cāṁssi nirvvōde koṭṭadmahī (śēvaḷige) salepipādavi
cakradōḷde ṣṭika(ṁ) sthāna(vā)gi naḍasuvadu .
Digital edition of SII 29.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
